results.title: ASWA Small College Athlete of the Year
results.description: Addie Edwards made quite the impression in her first season as a member of the Northeast Alabama Community College softball team. And not just with her teammates.

results.title: Bears quarterback Caleb Williams is the Madden cover man after throwing for 3,942 yards and 27 touchdowns a year ago.
results.description: Chicago is loaded offensively with quarterback Caleb Williams and skill-position talent, but its lack of talent on the defensive line could be its downfall.

results.title: Mapping Every Flock License Plate Reader Near US World Cup Stadiums
results.description: Most US World Cup stadiums are surrounded by surveillance cameras. Want to know if you’re being watched on your way to a match? These maps will help you.

results.title: Braga target Saint-Étienne’s Lucas Stassin
results.description: AS Saint-Étienne’s failure to return to Ligue 1 could prove costly. Relegation back to Ligue 2 during the 2024/25 season didn’t entail the departures of key players Lucas Stassin and Zuriko Davit...

results.title: 2026 All-Minnesota Baseball Player of the Year: Mahtomedi’s Connor Finn
results.description: Finn is arguably the top pitching prospect in the state, and his fastball tops 95 mph. On the mound this season, he’s 7-0 with a 1.07 ERA and 98 strikeouts in just 45 innings pitched.

results.title: Scott O’Neil says if LIV Golf can survive if Bryson DeChambeau leaves
results.description: LIV Golf’s future is in serious doubt, and much of their hope lies in Bryson DeChambeau. The two-time major winner is undoubtedly the league’s biggest star.

results.title: Opening of ‘incredible’ new facility expected to benefit thousands of youngsters
results.description: The country’s chief Scout officially opened a brand new activity centre in Hoveringham over the weekend.

results.title: Soccer Fans, You’re Being Watched
results.description: From anti-drone tech to face recognition, 2026 World Cup stadiums in the US, Canada, and Mexico are subjecting fans to an array of surveillance tech. Here’s what you need to know.

results.title: Meet the 2026 Strib Varsity All-Minnesota baseball team
results.description: Strib Varsity selected the state’s top 25 baseball players from the 2026 season across all four classifications based on individual success and input from coaches from various conferences and classes.
